en.ahmedali: How will you comprehend what the Steep ascent is? --
en.ahmedraza: And what have you understood, what the valley is!
en.arberry: and what shall teach thee what is the steep?
en.daryabadi: And what shall make thee understand that which the steep is?
en.hilali: And what will make you know the path that is steep?
en.itani: And what will explain to you what the ascent is?
en.maududi: And what do you know what that difficult steep is?
en.mubarakpuri: And what will make you know the path that is steep
en.pickthall: Ah, what will convey unto thee what the Ascent is! -
en.qarai: And what will show you what is the uphill task?
en.qaribullah: What could let you know what the height is!
en.sahih: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?
en.sarwar: Would that you knew what Aqaba is!
en.shakir: And what will make you comprehend what the uphill road is?
en.wahiduddin: What will explain to you what the ascent is?
en.yusufali: And what will explain to thee the path that is steep?-
fa.ansarian: و تو چه می دانی آن گردنه سخت چیست؟
fa.ayati: و تو چه دانى كه گذرگاه سخت چيست؟
fa.bahrampour: و تو چه مى‌دانى آن گردنه چيست
fa.fooladvand: و تو چه دانى كه آن گردنه [سخت‌] چيست؟
fa.ghomshei: و چگونه توان دانست که آن عقبه (تکلیف و ایمان) چیست؟
fa.khorramdel: تو چه می‌دانی آن گردنه چیست؟ [[«مَآ أَدْرَاکَ»: تو چه می‌دانی؟ (نگا: حاقّه / 3، مدّثّر / 27، مرسلات / 14).]]
fa.khorramshahi: و تو چه دانی عقبه چیست‌
fa.makarem: و تو نمی‌دانی آن گردنه چیست!
fa.moezzi: و چه دانستت چیست آن پشته‌
fa.mojtabavi: و تو چه دانى كه آن گريوه چيست؟
fa.sadeqi: و چه شناساندت (که آن) گردنه چیست‌؟
